n: The Taste of Hobbiton: Bustle with Burdy

steps.t: The Taste of Hobbiton can be observed during the Summer Festival. You should watch the Taste of Hobbiton and see if Burdy Gamwich wins the race as you…
Bando Brandybuck can be found at the Taste of Hobbiton. You should speak with Bando Brandybuck to collect your prize.
